transcript: Speaker A: Stop saying 'I'm fine, thanks', 'I don't know', 'You're welcome'. It's very basic. I used to speak the same way. Then my friend suggested practicing with Loora. on_screen_text: STOP SAYING. I'm fine, thanks. I don't know. You're welcome. It's very basic. I used to speak the same way. Then my friend suggested practicing with Loora. Let me show you. Sorry, my English is not good. You should practice everyday. But I don't have anyone to practice with. That's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. I can speak with you? summary: The ad begins with a woman advising viewers to stop using basic English phrases, introducing Loora as a tool to elevate their speaking skills. It then showcases a split-screen demo of a user practicing with the AI tutor, highlighting real-time feedback and supportive guidance.
